_doc: Initial-state TEMPLATE for the agentic-SDLC research-wave dispatcher. The live state file lives at /home/limitless/research-sequence-state.json on VPS-1 and is mutated by the dispatcher every cron tick. Copy this template to that path on first deploy. Do NOT commit live state — it changes constantly.
notes: Cron polls every 40 min via /home/limitless/research-dispatcher.sh. Dispatcher checks for output file at docs/superpowers/reports/research/<id>-*-2026-04-27.md; if present, marks complete and dispatches next via openclaw to #infra-eng with bind-mount-as-mailbox pointer. First dispatch (A.1) is sent manually; cron only does advancement.
